title: Level Z - Better End
description: A LevelZ Addon for the Better End mod.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Better End mod.

This addon adds level requirements for most Better End blocks, weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add this mod to your modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
